description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of beige and brown exterior wall panels. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn and several mature trees, creating a sense of privacy and integration with nature. The main entrance is accessible via a wide concrete pathway leading to a small set of steps and a prominent front door. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially set back, adding visual interest to the structure. The overall layout suggests a contemporary suburban residence designed for comfort and style.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of beige and brown exterior panels, surrounded by trees and a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide pathway, and prominent trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard area, additional windows, and the setback of the upper story.
description_view_2: Alternate front angle with clear visibility of the entry steps, large windows, and the arrangement of trees.
description_view_3: Side/rear view emphasizing the flat roof, side windows, and the driveway leading to the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide concrete path, small steps, and a prominent door, flanked by trees and lacking a porch or overhang.
